description: Raj from Solana introduces the event focused on scalability in blockchain, highlighting the importance of community engagement and upcoming events related to decentralized applications. The panel includes experts from Dfinity, Kadena, Truebit, and Radar Relay discussing scalability challenges and solutions.
topic_summary: The event addresses scalability issues in blockchain technology, emphasizing community involvement and expert insights on overcoming challenges. Panelists will discuss the implications of scalability on blockchain usage and development over the next few years [t=109.52].
